case_title: OLD REPUBLIC NATIONAL TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY et al VS. CHRISTIAN BARBE et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

NOTICE OF MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAR-05-2004 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 608. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR MAR-29-2004 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON OCT-03-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

(AMENDED ORDER DUE TO ADDRESS CORRECTION) NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR MAR-29-2004 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. THE MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-05-2004 REMAINS AS PREVIOUSLY SCHEDULED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OLD REPUBLIC NATIONAL TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY A MINNESOTA CORPORATION OLD REPUBLIC TITLE COMPANY A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARBE, CHRISTIAN $515,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $515,000.00, RESPECTIVE PARTIES SHALL EACH BEAR THEIR OW COSTS. COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION OVER THE PARTIES AT THEIR REQUEST IN ORDER TO ENFORCE THE SETTLEMENT UNTIL PERORMANCE IN FULL OF ITS TERMS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
